Model_20_MLB_Reliever_Spin_Rate_Decay.md.raw_concept: Fading relief pitchers operating on zero days rest who heavily rely on high-spin breaking balls.

Model_14_MLB_Umpire_Variance.md.raw_concept: Tracking the interaction between extreme pitch-framing catchers and umpires with historically wide strike zones.

Model_27_NCAAB_Tournament_Fatigue.md.raw_concept: Fading mid-major teams who are forced to play their 3rd game in 3 days during their conference tournament, especially when facing a higher-seeded team that received a double-bye (rested).
